title: The Brink
overview: Now unconstrained by an official post, Steve Bannon is free to peddle influence as a perceived kingmaker, who some say still has a direct line to the White House. After anointing himself leader of the “populist movement,” he travels around the North America and Europe spreading his hard-line anti-immigration message.

trailers.title: STEVE BANNON LE GRAND MANIPULATEUR - Bande Annonce VOST
